name: hazman5540
description: hazman5540 monorepo — Cloudflare Pages (frontend) + Cloudflare Workers (backend/Hono) + D1

scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev --prefix backend" "npm run dev --prefix frontend"
scripts.deploy: npm run deploy:backend && npm run deploy:frontend
scripts.deploy:frontend: npm run build --prefix frontend && npm run deploy --prefix frontend
